parameters.text: Can you forecast the tomorrow weather in San Francisco for me?

steps.description: Type the text "Can you forecast the tomorrow weather in San Francisco for me?" into the "Message Copilot" input box in the M365 Copilot web app chat interface, within the vscuse_app_rYGjwlocal agent conversation.
Press the Enter key to submit the weather query in the chat input box of the M365 Copilot web app (vscuse_app_rYGjwlocal).
